overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic survival horror game featuring an FBI agent in a foggy jacket exploring a dense Pacific Northwest forest trail. The character follows a partner through atmospheric fog, ascending wooden stairs, climbing over a stone wall, and unlocking a chain-link gate to proceed deeper into the woods.

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow forest trail, following a partner who becomes visible ahead in the fog

dense evergreen forest creating a canopy overhead
misty mountain peak visible through gaps in the trees
ferns and moss covering the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy forest trail with dense evergreen trees and a wooden guard rail lining the path. The FBI agent walks forward following a partner who appears ahead in the mist, with distant mountains barely visible through the haze.

events.description: beginning ascent of wooden stairs built into the hillside

simple wooden railings flanking the stairs

segments.scene_description: The trail transitions to a wooden staircase ascending through the dense forest. The character climbs the stairs following their partner, with wooden handrails on both sides and the forest canopy closing overhead.

events.description: vaulting over a stone retaining wall blocking the path

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, a stone retaining wall blocks the path. The character vaults over the obstacle following their partner, landing on the other side where the trail continues.

segments.scene_description: The trail leads to a chain-link fence gate blocking the path. The character interacts with the lock to open it, with their partner waiting just beyond the barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with warning signage and rock formations

events.description: passing through the opened gate into the enclosed area beyond

agents.ego_description: walking through the opened gate and continuing along the forest trail

large moss-covered boulder formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the character continues along the trail past a warning sign and large rock outcroppings, following their partner deeper into the foggy forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy forest trail that transitions from an open path into a restricted woodland area. It begins with the FBI agent following a partner through a dense haze of evergreen trees and distant mountains, moving alongside a wooden guard rail. As the terrain rises, the path shifts into a wooden staircase that ascends beneath a closing forest canopy before leading the character to vault over a stone retaining wall. The scene then progresses toward a chain-link fence gate, where the character pauses to unlock the barrier while their partner waits on the other side. Finally, the camera follows the agent past a warning sign and large rock outcroppings as they venture deeper into the enveloping fog.
